case_title: ERIKA ROSE DUTSON VS. ERIC RUIMY, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA NICKEL SPA SF, LLC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUTSON, ERIKA ROSE AS TO DEFENDANT ERIC RUIMY, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA NICKEL SPA SF, LLC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
